2026-04-25T18:28:28.3998281Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-25T18:28:28.3999131Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.3999804Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4000420Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4000925Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4001302Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4001569Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4001867Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4002151Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4002520Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4002852Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4003335Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4003871Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
2026-04-25T18:28:28.4004210Z [36;1m[0m

2026-04-25T18:31:28.0718858Z `^https://kakakumag\.com/` を `resources/fullfeed/plus.json` に追加し、実ページ確認に基づいて本文セレクタは `div.article-edit`、後処理は `script` 除去にしました。あわせて `resources/fullfeed/items_all.json` から元ルールを削除し、`.github/port.md` の「移植完了」に記録し、`/tmp/gh-aw/cache-memory/port-progress.json` も更新済みです。
